description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that includes the built‑in SAST.gitlab-ci.yml template and the external qa‑sast.yml template. Define two stages: test and qa, and set the variables DS_DISABLE_DIND and SAST_DISABLE_DIND to "false". Add a sast job that runs in the test stage (inherited from the template) and configures its artifacts to export gl-sast-report.json. No custom Docker image or services are specified, and the pipeline runs on all branches.
